name: Password Change Form
description: Simple two-field password change form with new password and confirmation inputs, inline validation, and success confirmation.

default.description: New password and confirm password fields with validation and submit button

slots.new-password: d-control input for new password, minimum 8 characters, label above field
slots.confirm-password: d-control input for password confirmation, must match new password, label above field
slots.error: Validation error message area displayed below fields in destructive color
slots.success: Confirmation message that briefly replaces the form on successful update

slots.new-password: New password input with label, min 8 chars
slots.confirm-password: Confirm password input with label, must match

visual_brief: Compact two-field form constrained to 480px max-width. Each field has a label positioned above the input. The new password field enforces a minimum of 8 characters. The confirm password field validates that it matches the new password. Validation errors appear below the relevant field in the destructive color token. On successful submission, a success message briefly replaces the form content. The submit button uses d-interactive treatment with primary styling and reads 'Update Password'.

responsive.mobile: Form takes full width with horizontal padding. Fields and button stretch to fill available width. Labels remain above fields.
responsive.tablet: Form constrained to max-width 480px, centered or left-aligned depending on container. Standard spacing.
responsive.desktop: Form constrained to max-width 480px. Comfortable spacing between fields and button.
